title: Cole & Mason Derwent Salt and Pepper Mills, Adjustable Grind Settings, Gourmet Precision+, Stainless Steel/Acrylic, 190 mm, Gift Set, Includes 2 x Salt and Pepper Grinders
features: The Derwent mills are the epitomy of Cole & Mason style & elegance Contemporary in design, they are made from clear acrylic and stainless steel finished in its natural colour

Featuring the Cole & Mason Gourmet Precision mechanisms; carbon steel for pepper that strips peppercorns instead of crushing them, and diamond-sharp ceramic for salt, ensuring maximum flavour release from every turn The hardwearing qualities of these mechanisms ensure you will always receive a consistently outstanding performance
With 6 pre-selected grind settings for pepper, and 3 for salt, ranging from fine to coarse you will always find the best grind size to optimise the flavour of every meal

To clean, wipe with a damp cloth and use a clean cloth to dry We reco mmend you do not use any cleaning products as this can affect the finish of the product Do not i mmerse in water or place in a dishwasher

This Cole & Mason product is covered by our lifetime mechanism guarantee. Should your mill not meet the high standards and expectations of Cole & Mason products we will be happy to replace your mill for an alternative of equivalent value. Accidental breakage, poor care and damage from misuse are not covered.
description: From the manufacturer Experts of Seasoning, Performance and Flavour Cole & Mason have been designing and developing kitchenware from the head office in England since 1919. Cole & Mason offer a well-established and intuitively designed range, with a product for every seasoning task, from the kitchen to the table. Whether you need a manual or electronic mill, simple shakers, dry or fresh herb and spice products, pestle and mortar or an oil and vinegar pourer; all products are manufactured with the highest quality materials and available in a wide range of finishes Derwent Salt & Pepper Mills The perfect balance of stylishly contemporary and classically elegant. Contemporary in design, the Derwent salt and pepper mills are made from clear acrylic and stainless steel, to adapt perfectly to all kitchen styles and will bring style and elegance to your table. Featuring the Cole & Mason Gourmet Precision mechanisms; carbon steel for pepper that strips peppercorns instead of crushing them, and diamond-sharp ceramic for salt, ensuring maximum flavour release from every turn. Contemporary design; durable acrylic and stainless steel Featuring the Cole & Mason Gourmet Precision mechanisms: carbon steel for the pepper and ceramic for the salt With 6 pre-selected grind settings for pepper, and 3 for salt Supplied filled with salt/pepper To clean, wipe with a damp cloth and use a clean cloth to dry Gourmet Precision+ Mechanism Featuring the Cole & Mason Gourmet Precision+ mechanisms; carbon steel for pepper that strips peppercorns instead of crushing them, and diamond-sharp ceramic for salt, ensuring maximum flavour release from every turn. The hardwearing qualities of these mechanisms ensure you will always receive a consistently outstanding performance. Professional Grinding Performance Choose from 6 pre-set grind levels for pepper and 3 for salt to give precise adjustment of the grind from fine to course. Easy To Refill To refill, simply lift the lid off the mill, no need to unscrew or hold multiple pieces. Clean your mill with a soft damp cloth to remove sticky marks and fingerprints. Peace of Mind All Cole & Mason salt and Pepper mill mechanisms are covered for their lifetime. Should your mill not meet the high standards and expectations of Cole & Mason products we will be happy to replace your mill for an alternative of equivalent value. Accidental breakage, poor care and damage from misuse are not covered. Have your seasoning your way With 6 different coarseness settings for pepper and 3 for salt no matter what your meal, pizza, soup or roast dinner you can have your salt and pepper exactly how you want.
